Title: TC-01-01 Happy Path - Valid vault creation
Preconditions: Vault created, issuer onboarded, BIN and account ranges configured.
Steps:
1. Send POST request to http://10.88.250.40:40010/rgm/api/vaults
2. Request body: {
  "tspCode": "998",
  "tokenVaultName": "My Token Vault",
  "custodianIdList": [
    "custodian007",
    "custodian008"
  ]
}
3. Verify HTTP response code 200/201
4. Validate response body structure and fields

Title: TC-01-02 Negative - Missing tspCode
Preconditions: Vault created, issuer onboarded, BIN and account ranges configured.
Expected Result: HTTP 400, validation error indicating tspCode is required.

Title: TC-01-03 Negative - Empty custodianIdList
Preconditions: Vault created, issuer onboarded, BIN and account ranges configured.
Steps:
1. Send POST request to http://10.88.250.40:40010/rgm/api/vaults
2. Request body: {
  "tspCode": "998",
  "tokenVaultName": "My Token Vault",
  "custodianIdList": []
}
3. Verify HTTP response code 400
4. Validate response body structure and fields
Expected Result: HTTP 400, error: at least one custodian required.
